ssmincidents.responseplan.Actions.Description: The actions that the response plan starts at the beginning of an incident.

ssmincidents.responseplan.ChatChannel.Description: The AWS Chatbot chat channel used for collaboration during an incident.

ssmincidents.responseplan.DisplayName.Description: The human readable name of the response plan.

ssmincidents.responseplan.Engagements.Description: The contacts and escalation plans that the response plan engages during an incident.

ssmincidents.responseplan.IncidentTempla.Description: Details used to create an incident when using this response plan.

ssmincidents.responseplan.Name.Description: The name of the response plan.

ssmincidents.responseplan.Tags.Description: An array of key-value pairs to apply to this resource.  For more information, see [Tag](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-resource-tags.html).
